allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix Telegram pickup links and HTTPS handling

- Restore missing generate_pickup_token function definition \(was causing app crash\)
- Add ProxyFix middleware for proper HTTPS detection behind Render proxy
- Move pickup URL generation to routes.py for reliable BASE_URL handling
- Add PREFERRED_URL_SCHEME config for HTTPS links

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
